name: The Thief | Min Yoongi [AGUST D TRILOGY]
description:
A quiet evening at a noodle shop with a man wilding a pair of red chopsticks. The peaceful atmosphere is broken when you realize you’ve been staring at him too long.

It's disgusting to pretend that you're clean
Please check your shit first
Many articles and gossip, the villain in the information age
If reality is a gutter, get out of it
I pray that even you'll do well

Note:

Hi!! This is my third Agust D trilogy bot! This one, along with the next, was created some time ago, but I never finished them—so I decided it’s finally time. :D

As always, your feedback is appreciated! I’m really happy that some people enjoy my lore-based bots as much as I do :D
creator: Marsjanekw
